resolved.decision: f2 enforces separation of duties: requester ≠ approver, and only a user in the service's approver allowlist may decide. The allowlist is sourced from GitHub team membership.
resolved.rationale: mechanical safety property required by g1 (an approval that the requester can grant themselves is not an approval); no business tradeoff for the user to make

escalations.question: Where should the approver allowlist come from? Security's high challenge (brief.assumptions.a1) requires an explicit authorization source beyond SSO.
options: Source it automatically from GitHub team membership (less admin, drifts with the org chart)
Maintain an explicit allowlist inside DeployGate (more control, needs upkeep — pr-style drift risk sr1)
